title: Main Agent
purpose: The home of your primary agent — the Main Advisor. This directory contains the agent's core identity document, boot files, memory graph orientation index, and all node-specific configurations. The agent's definition governs how it operates; its memory system is who it is.

contents.description: PRIMARY BOOT DOC — identity, operating parameters, mandatory boot sequence, boundary constraints, Prime User profile

contents.description: Tag system for memory graph navigation and extension
